distance_km.note: No reliable web sources found mentioning a 'Hakkoda Ski Tour' cross-country ski race or its distance; results describe Hakkoda Ski Area downhill/backcountry ski courses (e.g., 4-5.3km tours)[3]

elevation_m.note: No sources confirm a cross-country race with 300m elevation gain; ski area tour routes mention vertical drops of 524m or 724m, not matching classic XC profile[3]

discipline.note: No sources mention any cross-country ski race at Hakkoda, classic or otherwise; area focuses on downhill, powder, backcountry skiing[1][3]

field_size.note: No information on participants for any Hakkoda Ski Tour race; no race documented in sources[1-10]

founded.note: No sources mention a 'Hakkoda Ski Tour' race or its founding year[1-10]

official_website.note: https://www.hakkoda-ropeway.jp is the official Hakkoda Ropeway site, linked to ski area[2][6]

race_date.note: No sources confirm a cross-country race in late February; ski area operates Dec-May, some routes open early March/April[3]
